changes.content:
# Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3H-R1

Mission `ENG-20260722-012832-1285F2` repairs the blocked Workshop archive-key separator while preserving the previously authorized WebUI-only self-knowledge integration. It intercepts only `/api/chat/send` and `/api/chat/stream`, restores the original request stream for pass-through, and leaves Desktop files untouched.

intent: Adopt the already-present single verified V1A-3H WebUI seam without modifying core/foxai_web.py, restore only the same three missing support files, preserve all 48 previously passing integration cases, and repair only LF-only canonical evidence serialization.
rollback_boundary: Remove only the three newly installed V1A-3H support files and the mission-bound R5 evidence directory. core/foxai_web.py is not a changed path and remains byte-for-byte unchanged.
title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3H-R5 — Canonical Evidence Byte Serialization Repair

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json,zipfile,textwrap
web=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py"); raw=web.read_bytes()
assert len(raw)==2353581, len(raw)
assert hashlib.sha256(raw).hexdigest()=="d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952"
text=raw.decode("utf-8"); compile(text,str(web),"exec")
begin=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_BEGIN\n"; end=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_END\n"
assert raw.count(begin)==1 and raw.count(end)==1
start=raw.index(begin); finish=raw.index(end,start)+len(end); block=raw[start:finish]
assert len(block)==1824 and hashlib.sha256(block).hexdigest()=="36195f2bec555a2c9ec9fc6d9f981d0522f059fb0e069a3f5143cdcd5ad54961"
dedented=textwrap.dedent(block.decode("utf-8"))
harness_source="def run(self):\n"+textwrap.indent(dedented,"    ")+"    self.original_route_calls += 1\n"
compile(harness_source,"<v1a3h-r3-preflight>","exec")
assert raw[:start].count(b"\n")+1==13316 and raw[:finish].count(b"\n")==13345
base=raw[:start]+raw[finish:]
assert len(base)==2351757 and hashlib.sha256(base).hexdigest()=="e4e9fd62e6c4736a18781c6b17184441e8852412867cc95dbca94e570921ba77"
checks={
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py":(7587,"ed20fce59691875ff409caef0a879243e277d4628e73fcf0981b3e8387fb599c"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json":(894,"44e52bfbcabe9efee87d6a95a797a076d893eb963df33b676ae98e0b85fc0cd3"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\README_V1A3H.md":(359,"4c273d5464ffc81fbb004c23fb0ea658a0379540ebc84c3437d29c3d74863870"),
 r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\self_knowledge_chat_adapter_v1.py":(None,"a80a9047e0eebd9ac87fe4d656c565bc6534563bb3c97e1ad9b59823a36804f7"),
}
for name,(size,sha) in checks.items():
 p=Path(name); data=p.read_bytes(); assert size is None or len(data)==size, (name,len(data)); assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==sha, name
snap=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625")
manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
m=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text(encoding="utf-8")); entries=m["entries"]
expected=["System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1A3H.md", "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json", "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py"]
assert sorted(e["relative_path"] for e in entries)==expected
assert all(e["existed"] is False for e in entries)
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3H_R5_ADOPTED_SEAM_AND_SUPPORT_OK")
validations.name: Preflight-compile exact seam harness and verify support hashes, adapter, snapshot, and unchanged WebUI
Run isolated unchanged V1A-3H integration component self-test

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,importlib.util,io,json,textwrap
web=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py"); raw=web.read_bytes(); assert hashlib.sha256(raw).hexdigest()=="d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952"
begin=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_BEGIN\n"; end=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_END\n"
s=raw.index(begin); e=raw.index(end,s)+len(end); block=raw[s:e].decode("utf-8")
dedented=textwrap.dedent(block)
source="def run(self):\n"+textwrap.indent(dedented,"    ")+"    self.original_route_calls += 1\n"
compiled=compile(source,"<exact-v1a3h-seam-r3>","exec")
ns={}; exec(compiled,ns); run=ns["run"]
class H:
 def __init__(self,route,body):
  self.path=route; self.headers={"Content-Length":str(len(body))}; self.rfile=io.BytesIO(body); self.wfile=io.BytesIO(); self.status=[]; self.out_headers=[]; self.end_count=0; self.original_route_calls=0
 def send_response(self,x): self.status.append(x)
 def send_header(self,k,v): self.out_headers.append((k,v))
 def end_headers(self): self.end_count+=1
messages={
 "list_protected_contexts":"Agent Fox, list protected contexts",
 "contexts_for_launcher":"Agent Fox, contexts for launcher START_FOXAI_WEB_PORTABLE.bat",
 "launcher_runtime_entry_mapping":"Agent Fox, which python runs Workshop Main foxai.py",
 "summarize_context":"Agent Fox, summarize context Web Portable",
 "list_unresolved_branches":"Agent Fox, unresolved imports for Web Portable",
 "show_package_candidates":"Agent Fox, package candidates for Web Portable",
 "explain_runtime_uncertainty":"Agent Fox, runtime uncertainty for Workshop Main foxai.py",
 "show_linked_contexts":"Agent Fox, linked contexts for Workshop Main foxai.py",
 "locate_authoritative_evidence":"Agent Fox, where did this fact come from for Workshop Main foxai.py runtime id",
 "compare_contexts":"Agent Fox, compare contexts Workshop Main foxai.py and Desktop Recovery GUI foxai.py",
 "summarize_technical_core_coverage":"Agent Fox, technical core coverage",
}
rows=[]; compatibility={}
for route in ("/api/chat/send","/api/chat/stream"):
 for intent,message in messages.items():
  body=(json.dumps({"message":message},separators=(",",":"))+"\n").encode("utf-8")
  h1=H(route,body); run(h1); out1=h1.wfile.getvalue(); h2=H(route,body); run(h2); out2=h2.wfile.getvalue()
  assert out1==out2 and h1.original_route_calls==0 and h2.original_route_calls==0
  assert h1.status==[200] and h1.end_count==1 and h1.rfile.getvalue()==body and b"answer_packet" not in out1
  headers=dict(h1.out_headers); assert int(headers["Content-Length"])==len(out1)
  if route.endswith("send"):
   payload=json.loads(out1); assert payload["self_knowledge"] is True and payload["status"]=="answered" and payload["answer"]
   shape="single_json"
  else:
   events=[json.loads(line) for line in out1.splitlines()]; assert [x["type"] for x in events]==["start","chunk","final"]
   assert sum(x["type"]=="final" for x in events)==1 and events[-1]["status"]=="answered" and events[1]["text"]==events[-1]["answer"]
   shape="ndjson_start_chunk_final"
  rows.append({"id":f"recognized-{route.rsplit('/',1)[-1]}-{intent}","class":"recognized","endpoint":route,"intent":intent,"passed":True,"original_route_calls":0,"dispatch_sentinel_calls":0,"deterministic_equal":True})
  compatibility[route]={"shape":shape,"content_type":headers["Content-Type"],"terminal_event_count":1 if route.endswith("stream") else 0}
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625_V1A3H_R5_WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION"); out.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=False)
def canon(obj): return (json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True)+"\n").encode("utf-8")
def write(name,obj):
 data=canon(obj); assert b"\r" not in data; (out/name).write_bytes(data)
write("WEBUI_RESPONSE_COMPATIBILITY.json",{"schema":"v1a3h_r5.responses.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625","existing_seam_adopted":True,"endpoints":compatibility,"deterministic_repeated_request_equality":True,"duplicate_assistant_answers":0,"answer_packet_leaks":0})
write("WEBUI_MODEL_BYPASS_EVIDENCE.json",{"schema":"v1a3h_r5.model_bypass.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625","recognized_case_count":len(rows),"supported_intent_count":11,"endpoint_count":2,"chat_api_calls":0,"iter_chat_stream_calls":0,"provider_calls":0,"model_calls":0,"rows":rows})
print(json.dumps({"status":"recognized_seam_tests_passed","cases":len(rows),"intents":11,"endpoints":2}))
validations.name: Execute exact adopted seam with LF-only evidence writes for all eleven intents on both WebUI endpoints

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,importlib.util,io,json,shutil,tempfile,textwrap
web=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py"); raw=web.read_bytes(); assert hashlib.sha256(raw).hexdigest()=="d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952"
begin=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_BEGIN\n"; end=b"        # FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_END\n"; s=raw.index(begin); e=raw.index(end,s)+len(end)
block=raw[s:e].decode("utf-8"); dedented=textwrap.dedent(block); source="def run(self):\n"+textwrap.indent(dedented,"    ")+"    self.original_route_calls += 1\n"; compiled=compile(source,"<exact-v1a3h-seam-r3>","exec"); ns={}; exec(compiled,ns); run=ns["run"]
class H:
 def __init__(self,route,body): self.path=route; self.headers={"Content-Length":str(len(body))}; self.rfile=io.BytesIO(body); self.wfile=io.BytesIO(); self.status=[]; self.out_headers=[]; self.end_count=0; self.original_route_calls=0
 def send_response(self,x): self.status.append(x)
 def send_header(self,k,v): self.out_headers.append((k,v))
 def end_headers(self): self.end_count+=1
def body(message): return (json.dumps({"message":message},separators=(",",":"))+"\n").encode()
ordinary=["Hello Agent Fox","Write a short poem","Tell me a joke","Help me plan dinner","How are you today?","Summarize this paragraph","Start a science-fiction story","Explain gravity simply","Thank you","Open the Writer home","Help me name a character","What should I cook tonight?"]
unsupported=["How do I install Python?","What is a CPU thread?","Why is my browser slow?","Explain JSON syntax"]
rows=[]
for i,message in enumerate(ordinary+unsupported):
 route=("/api/chat/send","/api/chat/stream")[i%2]; b=body(message); h=H(route,b); run(h)
 assert h.original_route_calls==1 and h.wfile.getvalue()==b"" and h.status==[] and h.rfile.getvalue()==b
 rows.append({"id":f"pass-through-{i+1}","class":"ordinary" if i<len(ordinary) else "unsupported_technical","endpoint":route,"passed":True,"original_route_calls":1,"message_preserved":True})
ambiguous=["Agent Fox, summarize context","Agent Fox, compare contexts Workshop Main foxai.py","Agent Fox, contexts for launcher","Agent Fox, where did this fact come from"]
for i,message in enumerate(ambiguous):
 route=("/api/chat/send","/api/chat/stream")[i%2]; h=H(route,body(message)); run(h); assert h.original_route_calls==0
 data=h.wfile.getvalue(); status=json.loads(data)["status"] if route.endswith("send") else json.loads(data.splitlines()[-1])["status"]
 assert status=="clarification_required"
 rows.append({"id":f"ambiguous-{i+1}","class":"clarification","endpoint":route,"passed":True,"original_route_calls":0})
for route in ("/api/chat/send","/api/chat/stream"):
 b=body("   "); h=H(route,b); run(h); assert h.original_route_calls==1 and h.wfile.getvalue()==b"" and h.rfile.getvalue()==b
 rows.append({"id":f"empty-{route.rsplit('/',1)[-1]}","class":"empty","endpoint":route,"passed":True,"original_route_calls":1})
comp_path=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\AgentFoxTechnicalCore\webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py")
spec=importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("v1a3h_r5_component",comp_path); comp=importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(comp)
shared=comp._load_adapter(); original_loader=comp._load_adapter
try:
 comp._load_adapter=lambda path=comp.ADAPTER_PATH: shared
 shared._reset_audit_for_tests()
 for message in ordinary+unsupported:
  result=comp.route_http_request(body(message),"/api/chat/send"); assert result["intercepted"] is False
 assert shared._audit_snapshot()["registry_verify_calls"]==0
 comp._load_adapter=original_loader
 missing=Path(tempfile.gettempdir())/"foxai_v1a3h_r5_missing_adapter.py"
 if missing.exists(): missing.unlink()
 loader_paths=[]
 def traced_loader(path=comp.ADAPTER_PATH):
  loader_paths.append(str(path)); return original_loader(path)
 comp._load_adapter=traced_loader
 for route,message in zip(("/api/chat/send","/api/chat/stream"),(ordinary[0],"Agent Fox, list protected contexts")):
  result=comp.route_http_request(body(message),route,missing)
  assert result["intercepted"] is False and result["diagnostic"]=="self-knowledge adapter unavailable before recognition"
  rows.append({"id":"adapter-unavailable-"+str(len(rows)+1),"class":"adapter_unavailable","endpoint":route,"passed":True,"original_route_calls":1})
 assert loader_paths==[str(missing),str(missing)], loader_paths
 class Bad:
  @staticmethod
  def route_message(*a,**k): return {"handled":True,"status":"answered"}
 comp._load_adapter=lambda path=comp.ADAPTER_PATH: Bad
 mal=comp.route_http_request(body("Agent Fox, list protected contexts"),"/api/chat/send"); assert mal["intercepted"] is True and mal["adapter_result"]["status"]=="evidence_error"
 rows.append({"id":"malformed-positive-result","class":"evidence_error","endpoint":"/api/chat/send","passed":True,"original_route_calls":0})
 comp._load_adapter=lambda path=comp.ADAPTER_PATH: shared
 with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="foxai_v1a3h_r5_corrupt_") as td:
  bad=Path(td)/"registry"; shutil.copytree(Path(shared.DEFAULT_REGISTRY_DIR),bad)
  target=bad/"PROTECTED_CONTEXT_REGISTRY.json"; target.write_bytes(target.read_bytes()+b" ")
  shared._configure_paths_for_tests(shared.DEFAULT_BRIDGE_PATH,bad)
  corrupt=comp.route_http_request(body("Agent Fox, list protected contexts"),"/api/chat/send")
  assert corrupt["intercepted"] is True and corrupt["adapter_result"]["status"]=="evidence_error" and corrupt["adapter_result"]["model_bypass"] is True
  rows.append({"id":"copied-fixture-evidence-corruption","class":"evidence_error","endpoint":"/api/chat/send","passed":True,"original_route_calls":0})
finally:
 shared._configure_paths_for_tests(shared.DEFAULT_BRIDGE_PATH,shared.DEFAULT_REGISTRY_DIR)
 comp._load_adapter=original_loader
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625_V1A3H_R5_WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION"); bypass=json.loads((out/"WEBUI_MODEL_BYPASS_EVIDENCE.json").read_text()); allrows=bypass["rows"]+rows
def canon(obj): return (json.dumps(obj,indent=2,sort_keys=True)+"\n").encode("utf-8")
def write(name,obj):
 data=canon(obj); assert b"\r" not in data; (out/name).write_bytes(data)
write("WEBUI_ORDINARY_CHAT_PRESERVATION.json",{"schema":"v1a3h_r5.pass_through.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625","ordinary_case_count":len(ordinary),"unsupported_technical_case_count":len(unsupported),"registry_reads_for_unsupported_chat":0,"original_request_body_restored":True,"original_route_exactly_once":True,"adapter_unavailable_before_recognition_passes_through":True,"empty_messages_pass_through":True})
write("WEBUI_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json",{"schema":"v1a3h_r5.tests.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625","test_count":len(allrows),"recognized_case_count":len(bypass["rows"]),"clarification_case_count":4,"ordinary_case_count":12,"unsupported_technical_case_count":4,"empty_case_count":2,"adapter_unavailable_case_count":2,"malformed_result_case_count":1,"evidence_corruption_case_count":1,"all_passed":all(x["passed"] for x in allrows),"rows":allrows})
print(json.dumps({"status":"fallback_and_failure_tests_passed","total_cases":len(allrows),"registry_reads_for_unsupported":0}))
validations.name: Validate scoped loader restoration and write LF-only fallback evidence

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625_V1A3H_R5_WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION")
def canon(x): return (json.dumps(x,indent=2,sort_keys=True)+"\n").encode()
def write(name,obj):
 a=canon(obj); b=canon(obj); assert a==b; (out/name).write_bytes(a)
for name in ("WEBUI_RESPONSE_COMPATIBILITY.json","WEBUI_MODEL_BYPASS_EVIDENCE.json","WEBUI_ORDINARY_CHAT_PRESERVATION.json","WEBUI_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json"):
 p=out/name; data=p.read_bytes(); assert b"\r" not in data; obj=json.loads(data.decode("utf-8")); assert data==canon(obj)
matrix=json.loads((out/"WEBUI_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json").read_text()); assert matrix["all_passed"] is True and matrix["test_count"]==48
write("WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT.json",{"schema":"v1a3h_r5.contract.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625","endpoints":["/api/chat/send","/api/chat/stream"],"supported_intent_count":11,"existing_seam_adopted":True,"live_webui_patch_performed":False,"recognized_model_bypass":True,"clarification_model_bypass":True,"evidence_error_model_bypass":True,"ordinary_chat_pass_through":True})
write("WEBUI_CHAT_ROUTE_PATCH_MAP.json",{"schema":"v1a3h_r5.patch_map.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625","source":'Z:\\FOXAI\\core\\foxai_web.py',"source_sha256_before":"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952","source_sha256_after":"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952","source_size_bytes":2353581,"action":"adopt_existing_single_seam_no_source_write","marker":"FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H","block_sha256":"36195f2bec555a2c9ec9fc6d9f981d0522f059fb0e069a3f5143cdcd5ad54961","block_size_bytes":1824,"start_line":13316,"end_line":13345,"reconstructed_original_sha256":"e4e9fd62e6c4736a18781c6b17184441e8852412867cc95dbca94e570921ba77","reconstructed_original_size_bytes":2351757})
write("WEBUI_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json",{"schema":"v1a3h_r5.coverage.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625","supported_intent_count":11,"endpoint_count":2,"test_count":48,"changed_path_count":3,"existing_live_source_files_modified":0,"desktop_files_modified":0,"live_foxai_source_scans":0,"source_execution":0,"imported_live_foxai_modules":0,"live_sockets":0,"child_processes":0,"network_used":False,"packages_installed":False,"models_loaded":False,"comfyui_launched":False,"k_accessed":False,"deterministic_repeated_request_equality":True,"prior_r2_failure_classification":"validation_harness_indentation_defect_before_request_execution","prior_r3_failure_classification":"validation_harness_loader_monkeypatch_leak","prior_r4_failure_classification":"evidence_json_windows_newline_canonicalization_defect","canonical_json_writer":"utf8_lf_only_path_write_bytes","generated_evidence_carriage_return_bytes":0,"loader_state_repair":"restore_original_loader_before_missing_adapter_tests_and_use_try_finally","integration_behavior_changed":False,"harness_preflight_compile_passed":True})
core=[n for n in ["WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT.json", "WEBUI_CHAT_ROUTE_PATCH_MAP.json", "WEBUI_RESPONSE_COMPATIBILITY.json", "WEBUI_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json", "WEBUI_MODEL_BYPASS_EVIDENCE.json", "WEBUI_ORDINARY_CHAT_PRESERVATION.json", "WEBUI_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json", "WEBUI_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json"] if n!="WEBUI_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json"]
assert {p.name for p in out.iterdir()}==set(core)
rows=[]
for name in core:
 data=(out/name).read_bytes(); rows.append({"name":name,"sha256":hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest(),"size_bytes":len(data)})
receipt={"schema":"v1a3h_r5.receipt.v1","mission_id":"ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625","status":"built_and_verified","prior_r2_failure_classification":"validation_harness_indentation_defect_before_request_execution","prior_r3_failure_classification":"validation_harness_loader_monkeypatch_leak","prior_r4_failure_classification":"evidence_json_windows_newline_canonicalization_defect","canonical_json_writer":"utf8_lf_only_path_write_bytes","generated_evidence_carriage_return_bytes":0,"harness_repair":"textwrap_dedent_then_four_space_reindent","loader_state_repair":"restore_original_loader_before_missing_adapter_tests_and_use_try_finally","integration_behavior_changed":False,"existing_seam_adopted":True,"live_webui_patch_performed":False,"web_sha256_before":"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952","web_sha256_after":"d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952","changed_paths":["System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py", "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json", "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1A3H.md"],"changed_path_count":3,"existing_live_source_files_modified":0,"desktop_files_modified":0,"core_outputs_before_receipt":rows,"exact_output_count_including_receipt":8,"supported_intent_count":11,"endpoint_count":2,"test_count":48,"deterministic_rebuild_equality":True,"deterministic_repeated_request_equality":True,"registry_reads_for_unsupported_chat":0,"chat_api_calls_for_handled":0,"iter_chat_stream_calls_for_handled":0,"provider_calls_for_handled":0,"model_calls_for_handled":0,"duplicate_assistant_answers":0,"duplicate_terminal_stream_events":0,"answer_packet_leaks":0,"user_message_mutations":0,"source_execution":0,"imported_live_foxai_modules":0,"live_sockets":0,"child_processes":0,"network_used":False,"packages_installed":False,"models_loaded":False,"comfyui_launched":False,"k_accessed":False}
write("WEBUI_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json",receipt)
for p in out.iterdir():
 data=p.read_bytes(); assert b"\r" not in data; obj=json.loads(data.decode("utf-8")); assert data==canon(obj)
print(json.dumps({"status":"eight_outputs_built_lf_only","count":8,"test_count":48,"carriage_return_bytes":0}))
validations.name: Build deterministic exact eight-output LF-only V1A-3H-R5 evidence set

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625_V1A3H_R5_WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION"); expected=set(["WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT.json", "WEBUI_CHAT_ROUTE_PATCH_MAP.json", "WEBUI_RESPONSE_COMPATIBILITY.json", "WEBUI_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json", "WEBUI_MODEL_BYPASS_EVIDENCE.json", "WEBUI_ORDINARY_CHAT_PRESERVATION.json", "WEBUI_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json", "WEBUI_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json"]); actual={p.name for p in out.iterdir() if p.is_file()}; assert actual==expected,(sorted(actual),sorted(expected))
def canon(x): return (json.dumps(x,indent=2,sort_keys=True)+"\n").encode("utf-8")
for p in out.iterdir():
 data=p.read_bytes(); assert b"\r" not in data; assert data==canon(json.loads(data.decode("utf-8")))
rec=json.loads((out/"WEBUI_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json").read_bytes().decode("utf-8")); assert rec["exact_output_count_including_receipt"]==8 and rec["generated_evidence_carriage_return_bytes"]==0
for row in rec["core_outputs_before_receipt"]:
 p=out/row["name"]; assert p.stat().st_size==row["size_bytes"] and hashlib.sha256(p.read_bytes()).hexdigest()==row["sha256"]
assert sum(p.stat().st_size for p in out.iterdir())<8388608
matrix=json.loads((out/"WEBUI_INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json").read_text()); assert matrix["test_count"]==48 and matrix["all_passed"] is True
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3H_R5_EXACT_EIGHT_OUTPUTS_OK")
validations.name: Validate exact output names, hashes, sizes, test matrix, and total output ceiling

web=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\core\foxai_web.py"); assert web.stat().st_size==2353581 and hashlib.sha256(web.read_bytes()).hexdigest()=="d7bf0a2042d55ef7f0a5869556015e42c7427e7ff88636b28e1795f3adf7b952"
assert web.read_text(encoding="utf-8").count("FOXAI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_WEBUI_V1A3H_BEGIN")==1
snap=Path(r"Z:\FOXAI\System\EngineeringWorkshop\snapshots\ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625"); manifests=sorted(snap.glob("snapshot_*.manifest.json")); assert manifests
m=json.loads(manifests[-1].read_text()); expected=["System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/README_V1A3H.md", "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_CONTRACT_V1.json", "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore/webui_self_knowledge_integration_v1.py"]; assert sorted(x["relative_path"] for x in m["entries"])==expected
assert not any(x in expected for x in ["core/foxai_web.py","ui/main_window.py","core/chat_agent.py","foxai.py"])

from pathlib import Path
import json
out=Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-025009-F4B625_V1A3H_R5_WEBUI_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION"); r=json.loads((out/"WEBUI_INTEGRATION_RECEIPT.json").read_text()); c=json.loads((out/"WEBUI_INTEGRATION_COVERAGE.json").read_text()); p=json.loads((out/"WEBUI_ORDINARY_CHAT_PRESERVATION.json").read_text())
assert r["changed_path_count"]==3 and r["existing_live_source_files_modified"]==0 and r["desktop_files_modified"]==0
assert r["supported_intent_count"]==11 and r["endpoint_count"]==2 and r["test_count"]==48
assert r["prior_r4_failure_classification"]=="evidence_json_windows_newline_canonicalization_defect" and r["generated_evidence_carriage_return_bytes"]==0
assert r["model_calls_for_handled"]==0 and r["provider_calls_for_handled"]==0 and r["answer_packet_leaks"]==0
assert p["registry_reads_for_unsupported_chat"]==0 and p["original_route_exactly_once"] is True
for key in ("network_used","packages_installed","models_loaded","comfyui_launched","k_accessed"):
 assert r[key] is False and c[key] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3H_R5_SAFETY_AND_ROUTING_OK")
